div.note: Subject: MORALE REPORT
To: A.A.&Q.M.G., Headquarters
Forces Adriatic
From: 202 Mobile Dental Unit,
A.D.CROPS.
Owning to a small numerical strength of this unit, plus to unanimity of the replies given to questions, the report is actually a list of questions and answers.
Sec. I. hhh MORALE IN GENERAL

is good within the unit, the sole ambition of all personnel being a fairly general one. That of getting the job over. After two and a half years of overseas service, leave has been consistently refused, as any one member of the unit proceeding on leave would automatically incapacitate the entire unit. Releasing this, and the difficulty of obtaining personnel for temporary duty, as against the impossibility, to date, or the whole proceeding on leave, the problem has been solved by being forgotten. All personnel are happy with this state of affairs existing, as far as local leave is concerned. LIAP has raised hopes of a visit home however, but the chance of such a small unit being included in this scheme seems remote.
Sec. II. hhh DISCIPLINE.
No trouble of- any kin has been experienced in this respect. hhh CONFIDENCE
a) In Army Leaders and the war.
b) In Arms and Equipment.
c) In Efficiency.
Fairly high in all these respects. hhh MAIL
No cause for complaint whatsoever. hhh WELFARE & ENTERNTAINMENT
a) Living Conditions. As good as can be expected and better than many.
b) Recreation & Amusements. Satisfactory and greatly improved latterly.
c) General. Appreciative of greater attention paid to all round welfare of troops recently. hhh EDUCATION & A.B.C.A.
Hardly practicable in this unit, but copies of publications in this respect are available for personnel to read and digest. hhh RELATIONS BETWEEN OFFICERS & MEN
Proper. hhh RELATIONS WITH OTHER SERVICES
Rarely meet them. Existing relationship however is exactly as between ourselves. hhh RELATIONS WITH ALLIES
Always nappy to have a chat with a member of the Forces. Find them quite friendly at most times. hhh HOME AFFAIRS? POST WAR AND RELEASE
Wold prefer to answer Post War. Plans as published seen most fair. hhh FINANCE
No comment. hhh MISCELLANEOUS
a) Overseas Service. Philosophical about it.
b) Leave. Not particularly interested.
c) Relations with civil populations. More cordial in the ... Relationship rather Vagu.
Captn A.D.CORPS.
OC., 202 Mobile Dental Unit, A.D. CORPS.
O.M.F.
